<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kakuruno Shrine | native_name = 賀久留神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kakuruno Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.721659|137.67234}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kakuruno Shrine'''|賀久留神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kakuruno Shrine'''|賀久留神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kakuruno Shrine'''|賀久留神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kakuruno Shrine | native_name = 賀久留神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kakuruno Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.721659|137.67234}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kakuruno Shrine'''|賀久留神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kakuruno Shrine'''|賀久留神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kakuruno Shrine'''|賀久留神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].
